creator: freebsd@kumba.dev
text:
(In reply to Nikola Kolev from comment #3)

That may be coming from /etc/make.conf then, where I have these two definitions:
CFLAGS=-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing
COPTFLAGS=-O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing

I have been building stuff across four systems for the last two years (since 12.0-RELEASE) with those settings and haven't had an issue like this yet.  As far as I know, it's not wrong to use custom CFLAGS.  Is it possible the port is not handling custom CFLAGS well?
